---
title: "nitrix.augment.synthesis"
generated: true
signature-hash: 802d495d051140db
description: "Generative augmentation: synthesise images from label maps and bias fields."
listing:
  id: nitrix-augment-synthesis-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-augment-synthesis/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.augment.synthesis`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Generative augmentation: synthesise images from label maps and bias fields.

- [`gmm_label_to_image`](nitrix-augment-synthesis/gmm_label_to_image.qmd) renders an intensity image from an integer
  label map by a per-label Gaussian mixture: each voxel takes its label's
  mean plus that label's standard deviation times unit Gaussian noise.
  This is the domain-randomisation synthesis behind contrast-agnostic
  training (synthesise an image from anatomy rather than perturbing a real
  one).
- [`simulate_bias_field`](nitrix-augment-synthesis/simulate_bias_field.qmd) produces a smooth, low-frequency,
  multiplicative intensity non-uniformity (INU / "bias") field, generated
  by exponentiating an upsampled low-resolution Gaussian field.  This is
  the *forward* (simulation) counterpart to the *corrective* bias-field
  estimators in [`nitrix.bias`](nitrix-bias.qmd).

Both are pure functions of an explicit PRNG key.  [`gmm_label_to_image`](nitrix-augment-synthesis/gmm_label_to_image.qmd)
takes explicit per-label statistics so it serves both fixed intensities
and randomised contrast (draw the per-label means and standard deviations
in the caller); [`simulate_bias_field`](nitrix-augment-synthesis/simulate_bias_field.qmd) is a generator parameterised by
a magnitude bound.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `n_labels` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-augment-synthesis-symbols}
:::
